description: A grain-scoped picklist option. `category` groups options for one field (e.g. 'lead_source'); a blank grain axis (vertical/group/program) is a global/wildcard option visible in every grain. `value` is the stored token; `display_label` is shown in the picker. depends_on_field/value make this option appear only when another field on the form holds a given value (cascading picklists). Reached ONLY via the scoped picklist_query / grain-clamped list reads.

fields.description: The stored token written to the lead field.
fields.label: Value

fields.description: Human label shown in the picker (defaults to the value if blank).
fields.label: Display Label

fields.description: Blank = global (visible in every grain). Stored as '' never NULL (not_nullable NOT-NULL DEFAULT '' column) — canonical so the scoped query and the permission_query_conditions match identically, even for raw INSERT IGNORE seeds that omit the column.
fields.label: Product Line

fields.description: Cascading picklist: this option appears only when the form field named here holds depends_on_value. Blank = always available.
fields.label: Depends On Field

name: CRM Picklist Value
